description: Install dependencies and verify the existing test suite and cdk synth pass as a baseline before making changes.
steps: Run: npm install -g aws-cdk@2 (if not already available)
Run: pytest tests/ - confirm all existing tests pass
Run: cdk synth - confirm synthesis succeeds with no errors
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests in tests/unit/test_cdk_base_stack.py and tests/unit/test_step_functions.py pass
cdk synth produces a valid CloudFormation template without errors
findings: Environment requires: (1) pyenv global 3.11.15 to use Python 3.11, (2) unset NODE_OPTIONS to avoid missing preload module error with jsii/Node.js. Dependencies installed in Python 3.11 via pip. CDK CLI installed globally via npm. All 14 tests pass with 100% coverage. cdk synth succeeds.
